1.2.description: Main house power switch is OFF
1.2.recommendation: Turn the main house power switch to the ON position and recheck systems

1.4.description: Shore power pedestal breaker is OFF or tripped
1.4.recommendation: Reset the pedestal breaker to the ON position and verify power

1.5.description: RV is not recognizing incoming shore power
1.5.recommendation: Check shore power connection and pedestal supply

1.6.description: Inverter or charger is showing a warning or fault
1.6.recommendation: Check inverter display for specific fault code and consult equipment manual

1.10.description: Lights appear dim or fans run slower than normal
1.10.recommendation: Check battery voltage and charging system operation

1.11.description: Battery cables appear loose or corroded
1.11.recommendation: Clean and tighten battery cable connections

1.12.recommendation: Turn the battery disconnect switch to the ON position

1.13.description: Blown fuse or tripped breaker detected
1.13.recommendation: Identify and replace the blown fuse or reset the tripped breaker

1.14.description: Single circuit or device not working
1.14.recommendation: Check the specific fuse or breaker for the affected circuit

2A.1.description: City water spigot is not turned on
2A.1.recommendation: Turn on the water at the spigot and verify flow

2A.2.description: Water hose has kinks or is not fully connected
2A.2.recommendation: Straighten hose kinks and ensure connections are secure

2A.4.recommendation: Replace the water pressure regulator or inline filter

2A.6.description: Onboard water filter was recently changed
2A.6.recommendation: Verify filter is installed correctly and not restricting flow

2A.7.description: Water system is not set to CITY or NORMAL mode
2A.7.recommendation: Set the water system valve to CITY or NORMAL mode

2A.8.recommendation: Check heating system for freeze protection

2A.9.description: Heated bays do not feel warm
2A.9.recommendation: Check heating system for freeze protection

2B.1.recommendation: Fill the fresh water tank and retry

2B.2.description: Water pump is drawing air instead of water
2B.2.recommendation: Check tank level and verify pump is primed

2B.2_weak.description: Water flow is weak from pump
2B.2_weak.recommendation: Check for clogs in lines or filter restrictions

2B.3.description: Water pump is not turned on
2B.3.recommendation: Turn the water pump switch to the ON position

2B.4.description: Water pump is not running when activated
2B.4.recommendation: Run the Electrical diagnostic to check power supply to the pump

2B.5.description: Water pump runs continuously without stopping
2B.5.recommendation: Check for leaks in the water system or faulty pressure switch

3.1.recommendation: Evacuate immediately and contact emergency services

3.2.recommendation: Refill or replace the propane tank

3.4.recommendation: Open the propane tank valve fully

3.6.description: Propane appliances have no power or control lights
3.6.recommendation: Run the Electrical diagnostic to check control power

3.7_clicks.description: Stove igniter clicks but no flame appears
3.7_clicks.recommendation: Check propane supply and verify tank valve is fully open

3.7_gas.description: Gas present but igniter not sparking
3.7_gas.recommendation: Check igniter battery or electrical connection

3.7_nothing.description: Stove shows no response when activated
3.7_nothing.recommendation: Check electrical power to appliance controls

4.2.recommendation: Apply the parking brake and retry system operation

4.3.description: Doors or compartments are not closed
4.3.recommendation: Close all doors and compartments and retry

4.4.recommendation: Run the Leveling diagnostic to verify RV is level

4.5.description: Ignition is not ON when required
4.5.recommendation: Turn ignition to ON position and retry

4.6.description: Lights dim when operating slide or leveling system
4.6.recommendation: Run the Electrical diagnostic to check system power

4.7.description: Slide does not move when activated
4.7.recommendation: Check for obstructions and verify motor operation

4.8.description: No sound when activating slide or leveling system
4.8.recommendation: Check electrical power and control switch operation

4.9.description: One side of slide moves differently than the other
4.9.recommendation: Check for binding or synchronization issues in slide mechanism
